text: The AI Asymmetry: Shifting the Advantage to Defenders. Launching Unit 42 Frontier AI Defense — a dedicated capability to help organizations secure AI deployments and neutralize AI-driven threats.
Excited to spend more time with Hemant Taneja and his team at General Catalyst.
Anthropic takes another leap forward with the release of their latest model. The barrier to entry for sophisticated cyberattacks drops to near zero, while the speed of those attacks accelerates.
The upcoming models are about to give attackers immense capabilities. We need to swiftly embed these capabilities in defensive systems in partnership with the cybersecurity industry.
Thank you for having me, great event at RSAC 2026.
